results.title: Shop at former police station applies for alcohol licence
results.description: A STORE at a former police station in Dudley has applied for permission to sell alcohol.

results.title: White House reportedly asks OpenAI to restrict GPT-5.6 launch as AI safety fears grow
results.description: OpenAI will reportedly roll out GPT-5.6 to a limited group of partners after the White House raised concerns about the model’s potential risks. The Information reports that the Trump administration wants customer-by-customer approval before a wider public release.

results.title: Bankers told to ensure timely approval of loans under welfare schemes
results.description: Ranga Reddy DCC meeting discusses simplifying loan-sanctioning process, removing bottlenecks in credit disbursement and expediting assistance to eligible beneficiaries

results.title: More than 20pct of M'sian pig farms shuttered in 2024-2025, production dropped 15pct
results.description: Supply is now increasingly reliant on imported pork.

results.title: Fajardo's last-minute TD toss leads Edmonton Elks to 23-18 win over Winnipeg Blue Bombers
results.description: Edmonton quarterback Cody Fajardo led the Elks on a late touchdown drive in a 23-18 victory over the Winnipeg Blue Bombers before a sold-out crowd of 32,343 at Princess Auto Stadium on Thursday night.

results.title: MERU woman celebrates after officially becoming an Irish Citizen - She got married to a mzungu old enough to be her grandfather (PHOTOs)
results.description: Thursday, June 25, 2026 - Kenyan woman Purity Nkatha Mwoga is celebrating a major milestone after officially becoming an Irish citizen, five years after relocating from Chogoria in Meru County. Purity moved to Ireland in 2021 after marrying her Irish husband, beginning a new chapter far away from home. However, she says settling into her new life was not easy. She had to adapt to the cold climate, unfamiliar food, and the challenge of understanding the Irish accent, while also coping with being away from her family and fellow Kenyans. Despite the initial struggles, Purity gradually adjusted and built a stable life for herself. She now works in a role supporting people with intellectual disabilities, a job she says has provided her with both purpose and personal growth. She notes that her success abroad has also positively impacted her family back home. Coming from a humble background, she was able to support her younger sister through nursing school. Her sister has since graduated and joined the profession. Purity describes her journey as one of resilience, determination and gratitude, expressing appreciation for the opportunities she has found in Ireland and the progress she has made over the years. Below are photos of Purity and her elderly mzungu husband. The Kenyan DAILY POST

results.title: Cop killer gets decades after point blank 'execution'
results.description: A man who shot dead a veteran police officer during a routine job has been sentenced, with a judge describing the murder as a premeditated ambush.

results.title: Facebook Marketplace etiquette: Man reveals hack to avoid helping with furniture pickup
results.description: A man’s video has attracted tens of thousands of views after he revealed the ‘perfect solution’ to a problem Aussies face on Facebook Marketplace.

results.title: Campaign launched to reduce waste dumping at Linden Blue Lake
results.description: (Kaieteur News) – Waste To Wealth Caribbean and its official Execution Partner, Outliers Zone Caribbean, this week met with the Town Clerk of Linden, Lennox Gasper and Deputy Mayor Wainwright Bethune where a sustainable model was presented to potentially divert up to 50% of the biodegradable waste currently destined for the dumping site at the entrance [...] The post Campaign launched to reduce waste dumping at Linden Blue Lake appeared first on Kaieteur News .

results.title: Team USA falls to Türkiye in final seconds, still set for round of 32 match vs Bosnia and Herzegovina
results.description: Team USA fell to Türkiye in its final Group D match at the 2026 FIFA World Cup in the final seconds, though the game never had knockout round implications.
